title: Guidelines on Reducing Fraudulent SMS Messages
summary: Sets telecom-sector expectations for reducing fraudulent SMS and protecting users from impersonation, scam messaging and misuse of digital communication channels.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Guidelines to reduce fraudulent SMS messages in Bahrain.
theme_notes.online_content.content_standards_moderat: Guidelines to reduce fraudulent SMS content.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law and SIM registration framework
